title: release v0539 rebind after deterministic archive v1
rawUserRequest: 先修复该流程问题，再重新进入。流程修复闭环后，重新生成 v0.5.39 候选证据并走完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程，不绕过门禁。
outOfScope: Creating or editing a GitHub Release
Changing release workflow or archive policy

sources.reason: Candidate release identity must remain v0.5.39.
Supported finalizer for source-bound candidate evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: Only generated v0.5.39 candidate evidence is rebound after the merged deterministic archive correction; publication remains out of scope.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized re-entry after the deterministic archive process correction closed.

preReviewWarnings: Verify candidate metadata is regenerated from latest origin/main and no publication mutation occurs.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.json remains v0.5.39 and release-state projections remain consistent.

guidelines: Generated release evidence is produced only by supported finalizer commands.

intent.problem: The merged deterministic archive correction changes the source tree and archive identity, so the previous v0.5.39 candidate evidence no longer matches latest origin/main.
constraints: Use latest origin/main as controlled source identity.
Do not publish or manually edit generated evidence.
intent.rationale: Rebind one candidate snapshot to the merged process-corrected source so the protected release workflow validates the exact same deterministic archive before publication.
